caption: A man wearing glasses, a white long-sleeved shirt with a bow tie, and a large, spiked gray wig sits in a studio setting. He wears black headphones and is positioned in front of a professional microphone. The background is filled with numerous framed photographs and a "LEE" branded garment. On-screen logos for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" are visible, with the text "BOSS TALK 101" appearing in a stylized red and white font. As the scene progresses, the man speaks, shifting his facial expression and slightly moving his head and shoulders. His mouth opens and closes in a speaking motion, and his gaze shifts slightly while he remains seated and engaged in a conversation. The camera remains static throughout the clip, focusing on the man from the chest up.
